title: Incorrect empty string values in query results
poc:
create table rock_qtl3(
     probename varchar(64),
     markername varchar(64),
     qtl real );
select * from rock_qtl3 where probename='AGIUSA1234' and markername like 'rmm_' limit 15;
select * from rock_qtl3 where probename='AGIUSA1234' limit 15;
key_bug_features: Empty string values in query results for specific conditions
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE rock_qtl4(probename varchar(64) NOT NULL, markername varchar(64) NOT NULL, qtl real CHECK (qtl >= 0));
INSERT INTO rock_qtl4(probename, markername, qtl) VALUES ('AGIUSA1234', 'rmm_1', 1.5);
INSERT INTO rock_qtl4(probename, markername, qtl) VALUES ('AGIUSA1234', 'rmm_2', NULL);
SELECT probename, markername, COALESCE(qtl, 0) AS qtl_value FROM rock_qtl4 WHERE probename = 'AGIUSA1234' AND markername LIKE 'rmm_%' LIMIT 10;
SELECT probename, markername FROM rock_qtl4 WHERE probename = 'AGIUSA1234' AND (markername IS NULL OR markername = '');
